title: DESERT SAGE MANOR - 211info
text: DESERT SAGE MANOR DESERT SAGE MANOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rental units, including two units for individuals with mobility disabilities and one unit for those who are hearing impaired. An elevator is available for the upper-level units. 966 W Juniper Avenue Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Low-income adults ages 62 and older and adults with disabilities. Must meet Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) income requirements to qualify. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 667-8607 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 667-8607 Main phone Main phone (541) 667-8607 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to check status of the waitlist FEES: Rent is 30% of adjusted income (includes water, sewer, garbage, and electric services) DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Morrow and Umatilla Counties Services: Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Older Adults If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
